text.message: But I stopped overthinking other players' strategies. I keep getting surprised by those strategies
I would if you would ask for fair trades
But you don't. So why bother?
You have city and 2 knights mate
But the 8 has rolled 2 or 3 times
Red has apparently no knights as well
Blue is taking it next turn
Don't you win with a brick steal?
Yes, if you got a brick
